name: Hood Sickle
description: Hood Sickle is a reaper who was originally one of the trappable Undead villains in Skylanders: Trap Team. In Skylanders: SuperChargers, he is an NPC racer, driving a Sky vehicle fashioned with skulls and ominous appendages. In Skylanders: Imaginators, Hood Sickle is a Dark-elemental Sensei who teaches Imaginators of the Sentinel Battle Class, changing slightly in appearance.
biography: At first glance, it's easy to be frightened by Hood Sickle. Some say it's his imposing stature that freaks them out. Others are unnerved by his menacing hood. But most just try to stay away from his long, sharp scythe - and it didn't help that he had a bad habit of disappearing and then suddenly popping up behind unsuspecting people. In fact, the Trap Masters that locked him away in Cloudcracker Prison hoped they would never have to see him again. But Master Eon thought there might be a chance for Hood Sickle to change his ways. Everyone said Eon was crazy, but after spending time with the mysterious creep, Eon learned that Hood Sickle was actually not a bad guy - just really super spooky. Hood Sickle took his job of terrifying others very seriously, and Eon believed that perhaps he could bring a similar dedication to teaching others as a Sensei. Plus, he figured that Skylanders in training would certainly pay attention in his classes.
personality: Hood Sickle takes his job of terrifying others very seriously. Though super spooky and imposing, he is not actually a bad guy. He is dedicated to teaching others and ensures his students in training pay attention in his classes - or else.

story.content: Hood Sickle was summoned by the Dreamcatcher as a surprise to stop the Skylanders' progress at Telescope Towers. The reaper was defeated despite his teleportation abilities and was captured. Upon returning to Skylanders Academy, the Skylanders took him inside the school to the Hat Shop for his Villain Quest 'Hatastrophe!', where the Molekin explained that Trolls had been making counterfeit hat machines. Hood Sickle shut the operation down and was awarded with Hatterson's thanks and a new outfit.

Despite the Trap Masters hoping they would never see him again, Master Eon believed Hood Sickle could change his ways. Eon learned that Hood Sickle was not a bad guy, just very super spooky. Hood Sickle took his dedication to terrifying others and applied it to teaching as a Sensei. He now teaches Sentinel Imaginators, who hang on his every word. Or else.

content: You'll never pull the hood over my eyes!
A partnership with me could reap many rewards.
I've got an axe to grind with yoooooooooouuuuu!!
What? A trap? I shall simply teleport out of here then. Did that work? No? GAAH!
You mean I can undertake the path of good now? Hmmm, let me think on it.
I've got the chop on you!
Sounds hood. I mean, good. Totally meant good that time.
I knew the Skaletones from way back in their underworld days, before they were cool.
I wonder if Persephone would consider a date with me. I've got no head, she's got no body, opposites attract, you know.
This is indeed a strange hood, for a hood like me to be in.
You are close to the end, Skylander.
Time's ran out on this one.
I can't, now. My head is not in the game.
Not now. I'm off my swing.
Tag me in, and I'll give you the edge.
Cut it out quick. Tag me in!
My scythe is at your service.
Another axe for the task. Excellent.
If you wanna give your Imaginators power that is truly a cut above, I am the Sensei for the job.
And I have a Secret Technique that will no doubt give your Sentinels the edge.
Victory, any way you slice it!
May the void have mercy on you!
Who keeps saying 'Level up'? Not that I'm complaining, mind you.
This will give me even more of an edge!
Gives new meaning to the phrase,'at death's door'! Oh wait, no it doesn't, that joke/wordplay made no sense.
A new hood for the hood!
My skills are clearly on the cutting edge!
Where is this place I'm in right now, the afterlife?

trivia: Both Hood Sickle and Grim Creeper are based on the Grim Reaper.
Despite his name, Hood Sickle actually carries a scythe in both of his iterations.
Hood Sickle was first mentioned in a MEGA! UK magazine before the character poster was revealed.
There's a glitch that allows Hood Sickle to teleport through certain Traptanium Gates.
He and Kaos are the only Villains with Quests at the Skylanders Academy.
He has red eyes in his artwork, but white eyes in game. In Imaginators, they are light yellow in the figure.
He, Cuckoo Clocker and Grave Clobber are the only villains to be summoned by another villain.
Hood Sickle is one of the first characters to change elements between games permanently along with Tae Kwon Crow and Grave Clobber.
Grave Clobber, Bad Juju and Hood Sickle are the first Undead creatures to belong to a different element.
He is the only male Sensei of the Sentinel class.
His catchphrase ends with a question mark, a trait shared only with Tae Kwon Crow, Ninjini and Déjà Vu.
Hood Sickle wondering whether Persephone would consider dating him is a reference to the Greek myth of Hades and Persephone.

trailers.name: Official Skylanders Imaginators Meet Hood Sickle
Skylanders Imaginators - Hood Sickle Soul Gem Preview

gameplay: As a playable villain, Hood Sickle can strike with his spectral energy scythe, but this leaves him immobile with a lengthy delay. He can also teleport ahead a short distance, summoning black ghosts in his wake. If he has active ghosts, they will explode whenever he swings his scythe, doing more damage than attacking normally. In Skylanders: Imaginators, Hood Sickle can strike with his duel war scythe and teleport ahead, summoning Dark Remnant in his wake. If he has active Dark Remnant, they will explode whenever he swings his scythe, doing more damage than attacking normally, and his attack speed will increase. He can also create gravity wells to slow down enemies, or acts like a turret with his soul gem.

basic.name: Dark Scythe Combo
basic.content: Press Attack 1 four times for a double ended war scythe combo.

basic.name: Dark Dislocation
basic.content: Tap Attack 2 to dash into the darkside. Leave behind dark remnant that enhance the speed and damage of war scythe attacks.

basic_upgrades.name: Gravity Well
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to create a gravity well that slows enemies. Gravity wells explode after several seconds.

basic_upgrades.name: Extended Dislocation
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 2 to charge up a longer dash. Longer dashes do more damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Dark Combo
basic_upgrades.content: Absorbing the dark remnants left over from dash grants more spins at the end of Dark Scythe Combo.

basic_upgrades.name: Detonate Gravity Wells
basic_upgrades.content: Gravity wells can be detonated by pressing Attack 3 twice in quick succession. Two gravity wells can exist at the same time.

soulgems.name: Scythenado!
soulgems.content: Attack a gravity well with your war scythe to create a tornado that shoots war scythes!

wow_pows.name: Scythe Scycle
wow_pows.content: The ultimate Sensei attack! Hold Special Attack to perform your Sky-Chi Power, and hurl dark energized war scythes.

abilities.name: More Remnants
abilities.content: Now drop up to 4 remnants. Press Attack 1 to absorb them and gain an extra spin, armor, more speed, and more damage during the Dark Scythe Combo.

abilities.name: Even More Remnants
abilities.content: Now drop up to 6 remnants, which grant another combo spin, more speed, more damage, and projectile deflection for the duration of Dark Scythe Combo.

abilities.name: Dark Stinger
abilities.content: The last spin in Dark Scythe Combo now causes a powerful shockwave.

abilities.name: Longer and Stronger
abilities.content: Gravity well does more damage and lasts longer.

abilities.name: Warp Pulse
abilities.content: Hit the gravity well with your war scythe for a shower of war scythes! So exfoliating!

abilities.name: Explosive Dash
abilities.content: Detonate the gravity well by attacking it with Dark Dislocation to trigger a large explosion of dark energy.
